title: Dutch Apple Crumble
description: A classic dessert made with tender apples, crunchy crumble topping, and a hint of warm spices.
instructions: Peel, core, and slice the apples. In a large bowl, combine the apples, sugar, flour, and spices. Mix until the apples are evenly coated.
Transfer the apple mixture to a 9x9-inch baking dish. Set aside.
In another bowl, combine the cold butter and crumble mix. Use your fingers or a pastry blender to work the butter into the crumble mix until it resembles coarse crumbs.
Spread the crumble topping evenly over the apple mixture.
Bake the crumble for 40-45 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the apples are tender.
Remove the crumble from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
